basics.name: Yeseong Kang
basics.label: Ph.D. Student
basics.summary: Ph.D. student at the Graduate School of Information, Yonsei University. My research focuses on model compression, TinyML, and AIoT-aware federated learning — with the goal of enabling efficient, collaborative AI on resource-constrained IoT devices.

education.score: Thesis: pFedHALO: AIoT-Aware Personalized Federated Learning with Hypernetwork-Adaptive Low-Rank Optimization in Resource-Constrained Environments

education.institution: Hansei University, Gunpo, Gyeonggi, South Korea

work.name: Graduate School of Information, Yonsei University

publications.name: Deep Learning-based UAV Positioning under Blockage-Aware Channels with Embedded Validation

projects.name: AIoT-LLM System for Disaster Environments
projects.summary: Developing an AIoT-LLM integrated system for disaster response environments, funded by IITP under the Leading Generative AI Human Resources Development program.

projects.name: Development of Image Fusion Technology for Improving Deteriorated Gas Sensor Performance
projects.summary: Developing image fusion technology to compensate for performance degradation in gas sensors, in collaboration with Hyundai Motor Company.
